---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem, limitation, or use case you want Mnemosyne to address.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches, workarounds, or competing ideas you considered.

## Additional Context

Add examples, related tools, prior art, screenshots, or heap-analysis scenarios that help explain the request.
